reference: I started feeling a painless throbbing sensation in my head. I am also experiencing dizzy spells. I recently had a baby about five months ago. I am nearsighted but choose not to wear glasses or contact lenses even though my eyesight has, over time, been causing me to strain while watching television, even on a fifty-inch screen. I have also recently gone from about five to six cups of coffee a day to one or two very suddenly. I am hoping one of the above is the cause of my discomfort and is not something more serious. Please help.
text: I set a feeling of pain with throbbing sensation in my head. I am also experiencing dizzy spells. I recently had a baby about five months ago. I am nearsighted but choose not to wear glasses or contact lenses, even though my eyesight has, over time, been causing me distress while watching television, even on a fifty inch screen. I have also recently gone from about five to six cups of coffee a day, so one or two very stuff. I am hoping one of the above is the cause of my discomfort and is not something more serious. Please help.
